generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in for a routine scan feeling totally fine.

Then the scan loaded 😳

And the face came out stretched into a screaming skull.

Quick challenge 🩻

What happened to this image?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Motion artifact

👀 What you see:
A face smeared into a screaming skull. This is a CT scout image and the patient moved while the scanner was sweeping so the body got stretched and stacked out of line.

🦴 Why it matters:
Nothing is wrong with this person. It is a pure artifact. The real risk is reading smearing like this as a true deformity or disease.
